SleeveStack on your phone (same Wi-Fi)
======================================

SleeveStack is a web app that runs on your PC. There is no Android APK —
use your phone's browser (Chrome, Samsung Internet, etc.) instead.

1. Start SleeveStack.exe on your Windows PC.
2. Connect your phone to the SAME Wi-Fi network as the PC.
3. On your phone, open the URL shown in data\phone-access.txt
   (created when the app starts), for example:
   http://192.168.1.42:8765/

If the page does not load:
- Allow SleeveStack through Windows Firewall when prompted.
- Check that the port in the URL matches (8765, 8766, …).
- Some public/guest Wi-Fi networks block device-to-device traffic.

Note: Folder pickers and Excel import only work on the PC, not on the phone.
